title: Watch integration test (cross-goroutine event detection)
acceptance_criteria: Goroutine A appends an event; goroutine B running task watch picks it up within a deadline.

Midnight-rotation regression test: drives the FixedClock across a day boundary while goroutine A appends events to both the closing shard (just before midnight) and the opening shard (just after); asserts every event is delivered exactly once to the watcher in correct order. Run under -race -count=10 so the fsnotify rename/create race surfaces if it regresses.
